questions: How do we size experiments for power and MDE?
Which inputs are needed for a power calculator?
qa.answer: Use baseline rate/variance, desired MDE, significance (alpha), and power (1−beta) to compute required sample size or duration. Calculators translate these into practical run times.
implication: Estimate baseline and variance from recent data; include seasonality.
Choose alpha/power consistent with risk tolerance (e.g., 0.05 / 0.8+).
Model multiple metrics to avoid underpowering secondary outcomes.
